name: gherkin-bdd
description: Gherkin BDD workflow plugin for writing, reviewing, and evolving behavior specs.

interface.shortDescription: Write and review Gherkin BDD specs.
interface.longDescription: Gherkin BDD provides a reusable workflow for turning product behavior into clear features, scenarios, step definitions, and review notes.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me write or review Gherkin BDD scenarios for this project.
